Question (Hindi): एक निश्चित जमा राशि पर 4.5% वार्षिक दर से एक वर्ष में ₹135 ब्याज प्राप्त होता है। उसी जमा राशि पर 5% वार्षिक दर से एक वर्ष में कितना अतिरिक्त ब्याज प्राप्त होगा?
Question (English): A certain amount earns ₹135 as simple interest in 1 year at 4.5% per annum. How much additional interest will be earned on the same amount in 1 year at 5% per annum?
Explanation (English): Let the principal be x ₹. According to the question, Simple Interest = (Principal × Rate × Time) / 100 => 135 = (x × 4.5 × 1) / 100 => x = ₹3000. Now interest at 5% = (3000 × 5 × 1) / 100 = ₹150. Additional interest = 150 - 135 = ₹15.

Question (Hindi): यदि साधारण ब्याज की दर 5% प्रति वर्ष है और 2 वर्ष में ₹500 का ब्याज प्राप्त होता है, तो मूलधन क्या है?
Question (English): If the rate of simple interest is 5% per annum and the interest earned in 2 years is ₹500, what is the principal?
Explanation (English): Simple Interest = (Principal × Rate × Time) / 100. Given: Interest = ₹500, Rate = 5%, Time = 2 years. 500 = (P × 5 × 2) / 100 => 500 = (P × 10) / 100 => P = ₹5000.

Question (Hindi): ₹1000 की राशि पर 3 वर्ष में 12% वार्षिक दर से साधारण ब्याज की गणना करें।
Question (English): Calculate the simple interest on ₹1000 at 12% per annum for 3 years.
